requirement_topic.en: GOST / ST RK and IEC 61851 Charger System Evidence

summary.en: Kazakhstan projects may specify GOST, ST RK, or IEC-family evidence for EV conductive charging systems, including IEC 61851 requirements for general system safety and charging modes. Even when EAC low-voltage and EMC conformity is handled separately, buyers, utilities, tenders, or engineers may request a clause-by-clause IEC 61851 package for AC and DC charger functionality.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦项目可能要求GOST、ST RK或IEC系列电动汽车传导充电系统证据，包括IEC 61851关于系统安全和充电模式的一般要求。即使EAC低压和EMC合格评定单独处理，买方、公用事业、招标方或工程师也可能要求交流和直流充电功能的IEC 61851逐条资料包。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦項目可能要求GOST、ST RK或IEC系列電動汽車傳導充電系統證據，包括IEC 61851關於系統安全和充電模式的一般要求。即使EAC低壓和EMC合格評定單獨處理，買方、公用事業、招標方或工程師也可能要求交流和直流充電功能的IEC 61851逐條資料包。

standards_or_laws: Applicable GOST standards adopted from IEC 61851 where specified
Applicable ST RK standards adopted from IEC 61851 where specified
Kazakhstan project, tender, utility, or engineering specifications

summary.en: GB/T 18487.1-2023 is China's common conductive charging system baseline. It should be crosswalked against IEC 61851 mode definitions, control pilot behavior, protection functions, environmental ratings, emergency stop, insulation monitoring, and DC charger communication expectations.
summary.zh: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中国常用传导充电系统基线。应将其与IEC 61851的充电模式定义、控制导引行为、保护功能、环境等级、急停、绝缘监测和直流充电通信预期进行交叉映射。
summary.zht: GB/T 18487.1-2023是中國常用傳導充電系統基線。應將其與IEC 61851的充電模式定義、控制導引行為、保護功能、環境等級、急停、絕緣監測和直流充電通訊預期進行交叉映射。

gap.en: Prepare a GB/T 18487-to-IEC 61851 crosswalk, identify any charger modes or protection features that differ from the Kazakhstan project specification, and provide test evidence for the exact AC wallbox, AC pedestal, DC fast charger, or cabinet variant.
gap.zh: 应准备GB/T 18487至IEC 61851的交叉映射，识别与哈萨克斯坦项目规格不同的充电模式或保护功能，并为具体交流壁挂、交流立柱、直流快充或柜体变体提供测试证据。
gap.zht: 應準備GB/T 18487至IEC 61851的交叉映射，識別與哈薩克斯坦項目規格不同的充電模式或保護功能，並為具體交流壁掛、交流立柱、直流快充或櫃體變體提供測試證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where referenced by EAEU conformity route, Kazakhstan law, GOST / ST RK adoption, tender, utility, procurement, or project specification; otherwise commonly requested as technical evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence is mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese charger category, customer, and project route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 18487 and IEC 61851 are related but not interchangeable without a documented crosswalk for the charger type, mode, protection logic, and project specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 18487与IEC 61851相关，但不能在没有针对充电设备类型、模式、保护逻辑和项目规格的文件化映射时直接互换。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 18487與IEC 61851相關，但不能在沒有針對充電設備類型、模式、保護邏輯和項目規格的文件化映射時直接互換。
